metadata.description: Local-first memory + reality-sync for Claude Code. Auto-injects MEMORY.md, git state, and session history at session start. Multi-machine sync, marker-fenced MEMORY.md auto-curation, opt-in test runner, cross-tool surfaces. Pure-stdlib, zero dependencies.

plugins.name: kos-memory
plugins.description: Per-project memory + reality-sync for Claude Code. Reduces 'X is not built' false-negatives by auto-injecting filesystem + git state alongside chunked session history.
